items.title: Solana, Sui and Aptos wallet data targeted in TrapDoor package attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: The TrapDoor package attack targeting Solana and other wallets raises concerns about security vulnerabilities, which could impact user trust and ecosystem participation.

items.title: Solana open interest drops 30% as altcoins slump: Is $68 SOL next?
items.whyYouShouldCare: A 30% drop in Solana's open interest signals reduced market confidence, potentially affecting liquidity and price stability as traders reassess their positions.

items.title: Crypto champion Trump may be jeopardizing the industry’s landmark legislation
items.whyYouShouldCare: Trump's influence on crypto legislation could create regulatory uncertainty, impacting the broader market dynamics and Solana's positioning within the ecosystem.
